Comment.MultiLanguageText: HMI: Teach mode selector (the 4th mutex mode). TRUE = teach commands + jog active and the replay FSM can run. FALSE = ignored. Mutex with GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode (ABCDE, transitional -- to be deleted), GDB_PalletizingCmd.bo_Mode (palletizing), GDB_ManualCmd.bo_Mode (manual). FB_TeachCtrl REGION Mode_Gate enforces single-mode-active via statTeachOK.

Safety: E-Stop chain healthy (TRUE = OK, FALSE = E-Stop active). Mirrors GDB_PalletizingCmd / GDB_ManualCmd convention. Default TRUE (PLCSIM phantom; real fieldbus E-Stop integration is a separate task).

HMI: which teach slot (1..16) the operator is currently operating on. Used by all four edge-pulsed operations (Capture, Verify, Clear) and as the HMI's "table row selector". Validated by FB_TeachCtrl as 1 <= idx <= 16; out-of-range pulses are ignored. Default 1.

HMI PULSE: capture current TCP into aPoints[i16_SlotIdx]. Edge-detected by FB_TeachCtrl. On rising edge (and only while statTeachOK = TRUE AND idx in range): reads GDB_AxisCtrl.LKinCtrl.output.actualposition (populated by FB_AxisCtrl MirrorTCP from ScaraArm3D.Position[..]), writes to aPoints[idx].position[0..3] (4..5 zeroed), sets abCaptured[idx] := TRUE, sets i16_TeachStep := 10 briefly for HMI feedback. Operator's main teach action.

HMI PULSE: move robot to aPoints[i16_SlotIdx]. Edge-detected. On rising edge: copies aPoints[idx].position to GDB_AxisCtrl.LKinCtrl.input.movelinear.targetposition, sets r64_velocity to lr_ReplayVel, pulses bo_execute. Used to validate that a captured slot points where the operator intended.
HMI PULSE: clear aPoints[i16_SlotIdx] (zero the position fields) and set abCaptured[idx] := FALSE. Edge-detected. Operator re-arms the slot for capture.
HMI PULSE: clear ALL 16 slots in one pass. Edge-detected. FB loops 1..16 clearing both aPoints[i] and abCaptured[i]. Operator's "wipe and start over" gesture.

HMI PULSE: start once-through replay of all captured slots in index order. Edge-detected. FB_TeachCtrl Replay_FSM transitions from idle (0) to load_next_slot (100), iterates aPoints[1..16] skipping uncaptured slots, drives each via the shared movelinear interface. Replay ends with bo_ReplayDone := TRUE and FSM back to idle.

HMI PULSE: abort replay immediately. Edge-detected. FB_TeachCtrl Replay_FSM transitions to idle (0) from any active state, clears bo_execute, the current move aborts via the MC layer's bo_commandaborted.

HMI: replay-move velocity (mm/s). Applied uniformly to every replay move and to bo_Verify moves. Default 200.0 mm/s (matches FB_ManualCtrl's safe-jog Cartesian dynamic). Auto-cycle palletizing uses 300+ mm/s.

FB status: current step in FB_TeachCtrl Operator_Actions / Replay_FSM. Values: 0=idle, 10=capture-pulse-handled, 20=verify-in-flight, 30=clear-applied, 100=replay-running (i16_ReplayIdx advancing), 200=replay-done (latched until next StartReplay), 800=fault. HMI status display.
FB status: which slot is currently being executed during replay (1..16). 0 when idle. HMI highlights the active row in the teach-table view.
FB status: latched TRUE when replay reaches the end of captured slots (once-through). Cleared on next bo_StartReplay rising edge or on mode exit. HMI displays as a "Replay complete" lamp.

AttributeList.Text: SCARA Phase 2 Module F teach-mode command + status DB (2026-05-23). HMI writes the mode toggle, per-slot operations (Capture/Verify/Clear/ClearAll), and replay controls (Start/Stop/Vel). FB_TeachCtrl reads them, executes via the shared GDB_AxisCtrl interface, and publishes back i16_TeachStep / i16_ReplayIdx / bo_ReplayDone for HMI display. Mode mutex: bo_Mode must be TRUE while GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Mode (transitional), GDB_PalletizingCmd.bo_Mode, and GDB_ManualCmd.bo_Mode are all FALSE.
